title: Dynamic Inventories
body:
# Shameless Promotion
Are you tired of those _boring_ resource packs that only provide _one_ inventory color? Need something with more variety? Well then, I've got you covered! Dynamic Inventories provides a different inventory UI in a variety of cases such as time of day, dimension, and even some biomes!
# Modded Compatibility and Requirements
Dynamic Inventories uses vanilla shaders to achieve its effects, so no mods are required. However, _compatibility_ on the other hand is a different story. Most optimization mods, such as [Sodium](https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium) or [OptiFine](https://optifine.net/) may not work properly with this resource pack as they often use their own rendering systems. They may work, they may not. If a mod breaks a vanilla feature, I cannot do anything about it.
